steps.title: Find the vertex input
steps.content:
The quadratic opens upward, so its vertex gives the minimum value. For $f(x)=x^2-48x+2{,}304$, the vertex input is
$$
x=-\frac{b}{2a}=-\frac{-48}{2(1)}=24
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the function shows the same minimum at the vertex. The answer is 1728.
